title: The Student Council President Marries into a Family
overview: A pushy woman barges into the vice chairperson's home, and he's left with no choice but to share his home.

title: Student Council President and Dinner at Home
overview: Against his will, their shacking up begins. Ui shows that she can wear two different hats: president and wife!

title: Student Council President and the Hand-Holding Experiment
overview: "Aggressive PDA disrupts campus morals!" The head prefect faces off against the student council president! Let's carry out "Love Liberation!!!"

title: Shelter from the Rain Without the President
overview: Love Hotel. Oh, Love Hotel. Love Hotel. Hayato and Rin go to a Love Hotel! Is that okay?! Will everything be okay?!

title: Making Up with the President
overview: Making up. Yes, making up. Making up. When people make up, they usually do this and that…Is that okay?! Will everything be okay?!

title: The Student Council President's Family
overview: Mom has arrived! …Mom? Huh…?! Mom?!

title: Sneaky Student Council President
overview: Misumi-san's older sister moves…next to Hayato-kun! Will his crazy shacking up be noticed???

title: The Vice President and the Two Infirmary Devils
overview: "The panties and lipstick both belong to me!!!" Misumi-san, and Misumi-san closing in on Hayato-kun. Will this end well?!

title: President, Bribe, and Exposure
overview: "We need to talk…" Ui has a secret. Will it finally be revealed?!

title: Sawatari-san's Midsummer Presentation
overview: Sawatari-san closes in on Hayato's house. Huh?! Now even Sawatari-san is chasing after him? What're you gonna do about it, Hayato-kun?!

title: The President Turns 16
overview: See-through.

title: More of the President's Family
overview: "Please, let me have your daughter's hand!!!" What's going to happen now???

title: The Playful Student Council President
overview: Ui wants Hayato to be more affectionate with her...and she'll do anything to get what she wants! But when he isn't responsive enough, she takes matters into her own hands...

title: Late Summer Festival with the Disciplinary Committee Head
overview: Hayato accidentally sees Rin's breasts! And now he can't stop thinking about it. She comes up with an unexpected way to fix this...

title: The Student Council President and the Photography Club President
overview: The campus photography club has an underground website! They have candid etchi shots of campus girls...and some blackmail-worthy shots of Izumi-kun and Rin from the festival...?!

title: The Disciplinary Committee Head's Awakening
overview: Hayato and Rin find themselves in danger of committing "indecent coed relations" while trying to stop another couple of students for doing the same thing.

title: The Vice President's Long Night
overview: Ui is sweating, burning up, moaning and gasping for air...because she has a cold. Hayato tries to keep his libido in check, but as the evening wears on, that gets harder and harder...

title: A Dangerous Afternoon with Niikura-san
overview: Ayane wants to know what it's like to have a boyfriend, so Hayato is enlisted to be her boyfriend for the day. But how does out student council president handle this...?

title: The Unrelenting Battle of the President and the Disciplinary Committee Head
overview: Rin finds out that Hayato and Ui are living together! Infuriated and shocked, she has to snoop around for evidence of foul play...and get in their way as much as possible.

title: The President's Efforts and Winter's Temptations
overview: Hayato and Ui are enjoying a relaxing evening at home eating dinner and studying. But they're bothered by Rin's numerous visits to her sister's place next door.

title: The Photography Club President's Hidden Desire
overview: Saijou wants to know what romance is like! And she wants to capture it on camera between Hayato...and whichever girl draws the winning slip of paper.

title: The President and Disciplinary Committee Head's Troubles
overview: Test scores are up and campus life has generally improved since Ui took office. But Rin still feels a little unsettled. Maybe if she tried dating someone, she would understand Ui's methods. But she insists she doesn't have a crush...

title: The Vice President and Treasurer Make Some Kind of Progress
overview: While on the way to school, Hayato discovers that Karen isn't wearing panties. He spends the rest of the day trying to avoid seeing under her skirt...but Karen still seems a little upset.

title: A Holy Night with the President and All the Rest
overview: Rin proposes a Holiday party with the student council and disciplinary committee. During this, Hayato's secret life as a crossdresser comes to light.
